name: NASM PT Online — Redirect A/B/C Technical Test (SYNTHETIC)
_note: Redirect test: Control A stays on /rev, Variation B -> /rev-b, Variation C -> /rev-c. Each variation fires ONLY its own 'Visit Page' event (diagonal model). Today only; window starts at go-live via dates.startTime.
_model_note: CORRECTED MODEL: the primary 'Rev Gen' event fires for ALL variations (it matches the ...program-rev URL substring, which all three destination pages contain), so the primary metric shows a real A/B/C comparison. Each variation ALSO fires its own destination-page event (Rev Gen B / Rev Gen C) as a diagnostic that the specific redirect landed.

metrics.name: Visit Page: Landing Page Rev Gen (PRIMARY - shared across all variations)
Visit Page: Landing page Rev Gen B (B's destination)
Visit Page: Landing Page Rev Gen C (C's destination)
